/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/src/keyboard.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/src/config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/src/wordlist.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/src/practice.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/src/statistics.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/src/history.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/src/ui_menu.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/src/ui_practice.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dvorak-practice.dir/src/ui_stats.cpp.o" -o dvorak-practice  -lncurses
